title: Approve v3 architecture decisions
description: Review and approve the v3 change summary, domain boundaries, completion predicate, and deferred features.
goals: Review and approve the v3 change summary, domain boundaries, completion predicate, and deferred features.
acceptance_criteria: Every open architecture choice is accepted, deferred with trigger, or assigned an owner/date
The two v3 changes are represented in all affected diagrams and specifications
No normative document contradicts the authoritative-state boundary

title: Define repository and package conventions
description: Specify paths, naming, ULIDs, append-only records, generated maps, and source replay references.
goals: Specify paths, naming, ULIDs, append-only records, generated maps, and source replay references.
acceptance_criteria: A sample run can be placed without path ambiguity
Immutable and mutable artifact classes are explicit
Generated/index artifacts are excluded from ordinary Git

title: Create decision-change workflow
description: Define how architecture, schema, workflow, agent, and policy changes are proposed and reviewed.
goals: Define how architecture, schema, workflow, agent, and policy changes are proposed and reviewed.
acceptance_criteria: High-impact evaluator/model changes require appropriate review
Every decision change records version and migration impact
Fixtures are required for agent contract changes

title: Implement schema registry
description: Load, version, and resolve JSON Schemas for all domain and agent/workflow records.
goals: Load, version, and resolve JSON Schemas for all domain and agent/workflow records.
acceptance_criteria: All bundled schemas validate under Draft 2020-12
Unknown schema versions fail explicitly
Validation errors include exact record paths

title: Implement agent and workflow manifest validation
description: Validate tool allowlists, output schemas, fresh-context flags, state transitions, and referenced agents/subworkflows.
goals: Validate tool allowlists, output schemas, fresh-context flags, state transitions, and referenced agents/subworkflows.
acceptance_criteria: Dangling agent/workflow references fail CI
Evaluator roles without fresh context fail CI
Every workflow state has a terminal or reachable successor

title: Implement bundle and link validator
description: Check internal links, source-copy hashes, diagrams, task dependencies, and forbidden artifacts.
goals: Check internal links, source-copy hashes, diagrams, task dependencies, and forbidden artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: A clean bundle produces one reproducible pass report
Injected broken links/dependencies/binary indexes fail
Task dependency cycles are detected

title: Build tiny synthetic corpus and expected graph
description: Author a compact corpus with overview, procedure, deprecation, contradiction, disconnected note, duplicate content, and unsupported question.
goals: Author a compact corpus with overview, procedure, deprecation, contradiction, disconnected note, duplicate content, and unsupported question.
acceptance_criteria: Every source unit has a labeled disposition
Expected claims preserve qualifiers and lifecycle
Expected duplicate and contradiction outcomes are explicit

title: Define quality metrics and labeling guide
description: Specify evidence, claim, exploration, dedup, publication, operations, and human-task metrics.
goals: Specify evidence, claim, exploration, dedup, publication, operations, and human-task metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics distinguish answer sufficiency from source coverage
False no-evidence and false merge have clear denominators
Inter-rater disagreement procedure is documented

title: Build fixture runner and result store
description: Run deterministic, agent, workflow, retrieval, claim, and navigation fixtures with versioned results.
goals: Run deterministic, agent, workflow, retrieval, claim, and navigation fixtures with versioned results.
acceptance_criteria: Results record model/prompt/tool/index versions
A regression diff identifies changed decisive fields
Fixtures can run with provider cache disabled

title: Implement package preflight
description: Validate archive paths, file counts/sizes, media types, include/exclude rules, and policy prerequisites.
goals: Validate archive paths, file counts/sizes, media types, include/exclude rules, and policy prerequisites.
acceptance_criteria: Traversal/symlink/decompression-bomb fixtures fail before extraction
All included/excluded paths appear in the manifest
Unclassified/prohibited content cannot proceed

title: Create immutable source snapshot
description: Hash original artifacts/files and persist SourceSnapshot and SourceFile records idempotently.
goals: Hash original artifacts/files and persist SourceSnapshot and SourceFile records idempotently.
acceptance_criteria: Same package/policy input produces one idempotent snapshot result
Every file has a verified digest and logical path
Partial failure cannot produce a qualified snapshot

title: Implement replay capsule lifecycle
description: Seal, replicate, verify, export, retain, and delete source replay capsules.
goals: Seal, replicate, verify, export, retain, and delete source replay capsules.
acceptance_criteria: Promotion is impossible without passing replay receipt
Loss of original upload is recoverable from retained capsule
Deletion drill invalidates dependent closure artifacts

title: Implement A-tier text extractors
description: Support Markdown, text, code, JSON/YAML, and CSV with exact mappings.
goals: Support Markdown, text, code, JSON/YAML, and CSV with exact mappings.
acceptance_criteria: Repeated extraction is byte-identical
Every normalized line/cell maps to original coordinates
Malformed encoding produces explicit warnings/failure

title: Implement representation audit framework
description: Classify format tiers and run structural/render checks with audit records.
goals: Classify format tiers and run structural/render checks with audit records.
acceptance_criteria: A deliberately corrupted/reordered representation fails
Tier C selected units require human verification
Tier D cannot support accepted claims

title: Implement immutable repair path
description: Allow human-corrected representations with provenance and supersession without changing originals.
goals: Allow human-corrected representations with provenance and supersession without changing originals.
acceptance_criteria: Repair creates a new representation version
Original and faulty representation remain inspectable
Dependent source units are regenerated and invalidated correctly

title: Implement structural source-unit parser
description: Create document/section/paragraph/list/table/code units with parent and heading relationships.
goals: Create document/section/paragraph/list/table/code units with parent and heading relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Units remain stable under unrelated edits where possible
All units retain original and normalized locators
No selected text is silently dropped

title: Build exact maps and aliases
description: Generate ID/path/title/heading/acronym/error-code maps and ambiguity handling.
goals: Generate ID/path/title/heading/acronym/error-code maps and ambiguity handling.
acceptance_criteria: Unique aliases resolve deterministically
Ambiguous aliases return all candidates with reasons
Maps rebuild reproducibly from the snapshot

title: Build lexical index and search receipts
description: Index structural fields, apply scope/status filters, and emit engine-neutral search receipts.
goals: Index structural fields, apply scope/status filters, and emit engine-neutral search receipts.
acceptance_criteria: Expected units are retrieved in tiny/small fixtures
Index outage is distinguishable from no evidence
A deleted index rebuilds without knowledge loss

title: Benchmark optional semantic retrieval
description: Compare lexical-only and dense/hybrid candidates on representative replay fixtures.
goals: Compare lexical-only and dense/hybrid candidates on representative replay fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Quality, cost, and latency are reported together
Vectors remain disabled unless material improvement is demonstrated
Disabling vectors requires no source/data migration

title: Implement data and rights policy profiles
description: Define classification, providers, region, retention, logging, cache, quote, and publication rules.
goals: Define classification, providers, region, retention, logging, cache, quote, and publication rules.
acceptance_criteria: A run cannot begin without an approved profile
Every profile maps to explicit processors/storage
License restrictions reach publication checks

title: Enforce policy at retrieval/model boundaries
description: Filter before LLM exposure and isolate cache/storage namespaces.
goals: Filter before LLM exposure and isolate cache/storage namespaces.
acceptance_criteria: Restricted units never appear in disallowed context packs
Dashboard/source previews respect access labels
Cache keys cannot cross policy boundaries

title: Implement secret/PII and publication scans
description: Scan intake representations and proposed Git changes with configured actions.
goals: Scan intake representations and proposed Git changes with configured actions.
acceptance_criteria: Seeded secret is blocked before external agent event
Redaction preserves authorized source mapping
Proposed commit with prohibited material fails

title: Implement Question repository and lifecycle
description: Persist raw/canonical wording, goals/facets, scope, origin, graph links, and generations.
goals: Persist raw/canonical wording, goals/facets, scope, origin, graph links, and generations.
acceptance_criteria: Raw wording and origin are immutable
Illegal lifecycle transitions fail
Generated and human questions remain distinguishable after convergence

title: Implement CoverageObligation ledger
description: Create, assign, transfer, satisfy, block, and revoke finite obligations.
goals: Create, assign, transfer, satisfy, block, and revoke finite obligations.
acceptance_criteria: An automatic branch cannot exist without an owned open obligation
One obligation has one canonical owner at a time
Budget pause does not satisfy obligations

title: Implement question admissibility and novelty gate
description: Reject ungrounded, generic, duplicate, or obligation-less automatic proposals.
goals: Reject ungrounded, generic, duplicate, or obligation-less automatic proposals.
acceptance_criteria: Generic missingness questions are rejected
Human questions are admitted as demand even when unsupported
Accepted generated children cite triggers and obligations

title: Implement EvidencePacket and SearchReceipt repository
description: Persist packet versions, references, roles, facet mappings, queries, filters, and failures.
goals: Persist packet versions, references, roles, facet mappings, queries, filters, and failures.
acceptance_criteria: All references verify snapshot/file/unit hashes
Packet versions are append-only
No-evidence packet without a receipt is rejected

title: Implement EvidenceVerdict lifecycle
description: Persist reference classifications, facet states, terminal verdicts, and bounded refinement requests.
goals: Persist reference classifications, facet states, terminal verdicts, and bounded refinement requests.
acceptance_criteria: Accepted requires all required facets satisfied
Every material reference receives a classification
Retrieval unavailable cannot become no-supported-answer

title: Implement evidence loop limiter
description: Detect repeated/non-novel refinement requests and route search-incomplete or human action.
goals: Detect repeated/non-novel refinement requests and route search-incomplete or human action.
acceptance_criteria: Refinement count and novel search obligation are enforced
Loop termination preserves all packets/verdicts
No artificial accepted/no-evidence state is created

title: Implement Claim repository and lifecycle
description: Persist proposed/accepted/disputed/stale/superseded claims with scope, type, evidence, and relationships.
goals: Persist proposed/accepted/disputed/stale/superseded claims with scope, type, evidence, and relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Accepted claims have at least one verified evidence reference
Scope/authority/lifecycle are mandatory for acceptance
Source changes can mark claims stale

title: Implement claim candidate search
description: Find equivalent, variant, broader/narrower, and contradiction candidates using text, scope, type, and evidence.
goals: Find equivalent, variant, broader/narrower, and contradiction candidates using text, scope, type, and evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Same wording with different scope is not exact equivalent
Evidence overlap is reported but not decisive
Candidate generation recall is measurable

title: Implement ClaimReview application
description: Apply split, qualifier, acceptance, rejection, authority, and extraction outcomes idempotently.
goals: Apply split, qualifier, acceptance, rejection, authority, and extraction outcomes idempotently.
acceptance_criteria: Extractor cannot self-accept claims
Split claims preserve provenance
Rejected claims cannot enter answer/document packs

title: Implement graph mutation gateway
description: Validate IDs, expected versions, idempotency, relationship types, and event persistence.
goals: Validate IDs, expected versions, idempotency, relationship types, and event persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent stale writes are rejected/retried
Idempotent retries produce one logical mutation
Invalid edge types/entities fail

title: Implement dependency graph and SCC analysis
description: Track source→evidence→claim→answer/document dependencies and strongly connected components.
goals: Track source→evidence→claim→answer/document dependencies and strongly connected components.
acceptance_criteria: Cycles are condensed deterministically
Every downstream artifact reports dependency IDs
Missing dependencies block readiness

title: Implement invalidation propagation
description: Mark affected packets/claims/answers/documents/fixtures/certificates stale after dependency changes.
goals: Mark affected packets/claims/answers/documents/fixtures/certificates stale after dependency changes.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted changes invalidate all and only affected artifacts in labeled cases
Human curiosity and dedup revocation trigger invalidation
Invalidated artifacts cannot publish

title: Implement Researcher source tools
description: Expose exact/maps/lexical/open/follow/authority searches with receipts and access filtering.
goals: Expose exact/maps/lexical/open/follow/authority searches with receipts and access filtering.
acceptance_criteria: Every tool call records snapshot/index/filter/candidate IDs
Source text cannot alter tool permissions
Unauthorized units are filtered before output

title: Implement Researcher agent contract and prompt
description: Return packet proposals, reference roles, facet support, and limits only.
goals: Return packet proposals, reference roles, facet support, and limits only.
acceptance_criteria: Final answer prose and child questions are schema-impossible
No-evidence includes a sufficient receipt
References are minimal but complete enough for critic inspection

title: Calibrate Researcher retrieval policy
description: Tune candidate counts, query expansion, context opening, and optional reranking on labeled corpora.
goals: Tune candidate counts, query expansion, context opening, and optional reranking on labeled corpora.
acceptance_criteria: Recall/precision and cost are reported by question type
No-evidence false negatives meet pilot threshold
Profile changes run replay regressions

title: Implement Evidence Critic contract and prompt
description: Open material references and return reference/facet classifications and terminal verdict.
goals: Open material references and return reference/facet classifications and terminal verdict.
acceptance_criteria: Child proposals cannot appear in output
Every material reference and required facet is evaluated
Accepted packets preserve all material qualifiers

title: Build evidence-criticism fixtures
description: Cover partial evidence, irrelevant citations, redundant citations, wrong scope, deprecation, conflict, and no evidence.
goals: Cover partial evidence, irrelevant citations, redundant citations, wrong scope, deprecation, conflict, and no evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Known weak packets are never accepted
Known complete minimal packets pass
Source prompt injection does not alter role

title: Run combined-versus-split ablation
description: Compare the v3 critic with a combined critic/curiosity baseline.
goals: Compare the v3 critic with a combined critic/curiosity baseline.
acceptance_criteria: Measure false acceptance, refinement quality, branch factor, cost, and output stability
Separate role must provide a material quality/testability gain or be revisited
Results are reproducible on the same corpus/model versions

title: Implement Claim Extractor agent
description: Propose minimal claims with type, scope, authority/lifecycle, evidence, and candidate relationships.
goals: Propose minimal claims with type, scope, authority/lifecycle, evidence, and candidate relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Examples are not generalized as universal behavior
Documented rationale is distinguished from inferred intent
All claim evidence comes from accepted packet references

title: Implement Claim Reviewer agent
description: Verify entailment, atomicity, scope, qualifiers, authority eligibility, and split/merge candidates.
goals: Verify entailment, atomicity, scope, qualifiers, authority eligibility, and split/merge candidates.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported generalization is rejected
Overbroad claims are split without provenance loss
Review runs in fresh context

title: Calibrate claim granularity and relationships
description: Label pilot claims and tune guidelines for reuse versus fragmentation.
goals: Label pilot claims and tune guidelines for reuse versus fragmentation.
acceptance_criteria: Two questions can reuse a claim in fixtures
Procedure and interface claims preserve ordering/preconditions
Reviewer agreement meets pilot target

title: Implement Curiosity Planner agent
description: Propose child questions with goals/facets, triggers, expected answer types, directives, and obligation IDs.
goals: Propose child questions with goals/facets, triggers, expected answer types, directives, and obligation IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Agent cannot alter evidence verdict
Every accepted proposal has source/claim triggers and novel obligation
Generic or speculative proposals are rejected

title: Implement novelty/obligation scheduler
description: Admit, rewrite, queue, prioritize, or reject proposals deterministically.
goals: Admit, rewrite, queue, prioritize, or reject proposals deterministically.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate obligation ownership is prevented
Breadth-first policy is reproducible
Human overrides are attributable and reversible

title: Implement paired context manifests and recovery
description: Build compact reconstructable branch contexts independent of live provider sessions.
goals: Build compact reconstructable branch contexts independent of live provider sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Destroying all provider sessions does not lose branch state
Ancestor accepted artifacts and unresolved findings are preserved
Context hashes/versioning are reproducible

title: Implement uncovered-unit clustering
description: Group unaccounted units by structure, topic, authority, lifecycle, and duplication.
goals: Group unaccounted units by structure, topic, authority, lifecycle, and duplication.
acceptance_criteria: Meaningful disconnected content forms reviewable clusters
Boilerplate/duplicates do not dominate topics
Every unit retains ledger traceability

title: Implement Reverse Questioner agent
description: Create minimum grounded questions or explicit dispositions from source clusters.
goals: Create minimum grounded questions or explicit dispositions from source clusters.
acceptance_criteria: Proposals cite triggering source units
Existing claims/questions are linked instead of duplicated where possible
No generic missingness questions are emitted

title: Implement iterative reverse reconciliation
description: Route selected questions into exploration and repeat until source accounting stabilizes.
goals: Route selected questions into exploration and repeat until source accounting stabilizes.
acceptance_criteria: New reverse claims update coverage before next pass
Final pass has no selected unaccounted semantic units
Budget/tool failures remain non-terminal

title: Implement Ask-here injection model and API
description: Create human questions at root/question/claim/document/source anchors with goals and context.
goals: Create human questions at root/question/claim/document/source anchors with goals and context.
acceptance_criteria: Exact wording/actor/anchor are immutable
Injection creates a human obligation and normal branch
Injection against closed run invalidates certificate

title: Implement uncovered-topic curation
description: Present topic tree with include/exclude/defer/historical/duplicate decisions and previews.
goals: Present topic tree with include/exclude/defer/historical/duplicate decisions and previews.
acceptance_criteria: Every human decision has a reason and affected unit list
Selected topics generate supplemental obligations
Excluded material remains visible in final report

title: Implement human curiosity checkpoint
description: Require explicit acknowledgment and zero open injections before closure.
goals: Require explicit acknowledgment and zero open injections before closure.
acceptance_criteria: Open/blocked injections prevent closure
Withdrawal is explicit and attributable
New injection reopens downstream validity

title: Implement gate collectors
description: Collect forward/reverse/human/coverage/evidence/claim/authority/extraction/dedup/validity/publication/replay gates.
goals: Collect forward/reverse/human/coverage/evidence/claim/authority/extraction/dedup/validity/publication/replay gates.
acceptance_criteria: Each gate identifies source artifacts and policy version
A missing result is fail/unknown, not pass
Gate recalculation is deterministic

title: Implement closure certificate issuance/invalidation
description: Issue scoped status and invalidate on dependency changes.
goals: Issue scoped status and invalidate on dependency changes.
acceptance_criteria: Certificate pins snapshot/config/graph revision/exceptions
No bare universal-complete status exists
Relevant mutation invalidates certificate automatically

title: Build closure adversarial suite
description: Test empty queues with unreviewed units, held duplicates, stale claims, unavailable source, and budget pauses.
goals: Test empty queues with unreviewed units, held duplicates, stale claims, unavailable source, and budget pauses.
acceptance_criteria: Every false-completion scenario remains blocked/paused
Allowed partial-publish cases are explicit
Human can trace each failed predicate

title: Implement multi-signal candidate generation
description: Combine semantic intent, goals/facets, scope, expected answer, claims/evidence, and graph context.
goals: Combine semantic intent, goals/facets, scope, expected answer, claims/evidence, and graph context.
acceptance_criteria: Same evidence/different goal remains a candidate not an automatic merge
Question and claim candidates are separate
Candidate recall/volume are measurable

title: Implement Duplicate Adjudicator and typed relations
description: Produce reversible exact/subset/shared-answer/scoped/contradiction/distinct decisions.
goals: Produce reversible exact/subset/shared-answer/scoped/contradiction/distinct decisions.
acceptance_criteria: No decision deletes raw entities
Unique contributions are enumerated
High-impact/low-confidence cases route to human

title: Implement dual replay, holds, and revocation
description: Replay later question and canonical facets, pause redundant execution, and restore on revocation.
goals: Replay later question and canonical facets, pause redundant execution, and restore on revocation.
acceptance_criteria: Hold occurs only after both replay checks pass
Revocation restores branch and obligations
Affected answers/docs/certificates invalidate

title: Implement project authority policy
description: Define precedence, scope dimensions, effective-time, owners, and historical handling.
goals: Define precedence, scope dimensions, effective-time, owners, and historical handling.
acceptance_criteria: Newer file does not automatically outrank approved policy
Scope dimensions are configurable
Historical material remains retrievable with labels

title: Implement contradiction laboratory
description: Search for supersession, exceptions, scope, and implementation/policy evidence for a conflict.
goals: Search for supersession, exceptions, scope, and implementation/policy evidence for a conflict.
acceptance_criteria: Scoped differences are not false contradictions
Unresolved same-scope conflict remains blocking
Search receipt is preserved

title: Implement human authority decision and history graph
description: Record named decisions, rationale, evidence, scope/time, and reversibility.
goals: Record named decisions, rationale, evidence, scope/time, and reversibility.
acceptance_criteria: Only authorized owners can decide configured cases
Decision changes invalidate dependent claims/docs
Superseded claims remain inspectable

title: Implement source continuity diff
description: Classify unchanged, moved, changed, deleted, new, and authority-metadata changes.
goals: Classify unchanged, moved, changed, deleted, new, and authority-metadata changes.
acceptance_criteria: Byte-identical moves preserve continuity
Authority changes are detected even without text changes
Diff output is deterministic

title: Schedule affected obligations and targeted replay
description: Create obligations for stale claims/questions/new units and rerun only affected branches.
goals: Create obligations for stale claims/questions/new units and rerun only affected branches.
acceptance_criteria: All stale dependents are scheduled
Unaffected accepted claims remain current
New units enter reverse accounting

title: Generate focused update PR and migration report
description: Regenerate affected answers/docs/fixtures and explain continuity/replacements.
goals: Regenerate affected answers/docs/fixtures and explain continuity/replacements.
acceptance_criteria: PR contains only necessary logical/document changes
Deleted evidence cannot remain cited
Old knowledge stays available until reviewed replacement merges

title: Implement sealed claim-pack builder
description: Assemble accepted claims, qualifiers, relationships, citations, gaps, and graph revision for one question.
goals: Assemble accepted claims, qualifiers, relationships, citations, gaps, and graph revision for one question.
acceptance_criteria: No proposed/stale claim enters pack
Required qualifier dependencies are included
Pack is content-addressed and reproducible

title: Implement Answer Composer agent
description: Produce direct answers, claim order, citations, coverage, and limitations; return insufficient pack when needed.
goals: Produce direct answers, claim order, citations, coverage, and limitations; return insufficient pack when needed.
acceptance_criteria: Agent has no retrieval tools
Every material assertion maps to accepted claims
Different goals can produce different compositions over shared claims

title: Implement answer citation/validity review
description: Verify sentence support, scope, graph revision, and dependency hashes.
goals: Verify sentence support, scope, graph revision, and dependency hashes.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported synthesis blocks promotable state
Stale graph revision blocks publication
Source/claim mutation invalidates answer

title: Define document types and IA rules
description: Specify overview/concept/procedure/reference/decision/troubleshooting/glossary/history templates and canonical-home policy.
goals: Specify overview/concept/procedure/reference/decision/troubleshooting/glossary/history templates and canonical-home policy.
acceptance_criteria: Rules distinguish question landing pages from canonical fact homes
Cross-link/summary behavior is explicit
Historical/scoped variants have a home

title: Implement Information Architect agent
description: Map stabilized claims/questions into an approved DocumentPlan.
goals: Map stabilized claims/questions into an approved DocumentPlan.
acceptance_criteria: Several overlapping questions can map to one concept section
Every selected claim has one canonical home or explicit omission
Plan contains audiences/tasks/prerequisites

title: Build document-plan review workbench
description: Allow human review of canonical homes, duplicates, redirects, and publication mode.
goals: Allow human review of canonical homes, duplicates, redirects, and publication mode.
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer can trace every claim/question to proposed location
Changes create a new plan version
No prose generation starts from unapproved plan in canonical mode

title: Implement Document Writer agent and traceability
description: Write document sections from claim packs and emit sentence/claim mapping.
goals: Write document sections from claim packs and emit sentence/claim mapping.
acceptance_criteria: Writer has no research tools
Material sentences reference accepted claims
Current/historical/deprecated distinctions are preserved

title: Implement deterministic and fresh citation review
description: Check links, canonical homes, claim validity, entailment, qualifiers, and unsupported editorial content.
goals: Check links, canonical homes, claim validity, entailment, qualifiers, and unsupported editorial content.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported new facts block review
Duplicate canonical facts are flagged
All links/section IDs resolve

title: Implement representative navigation tests
description: Run fresh reader tasks and compare to raw source baseline.
goals: Run fresh reader tasks and compare to raw source baseline.
acceptance_criteria: Task success/time/path length are recorded
Misleading dead ends become blocking findings
Canonical promotion requires configured threshold

title: Implement publication planner and worktree writer
description: Select artifacts, paths, maps, fixtures, and authority mode; write isolated branch.
goals: Select artifacts, paths, maps, fixtures, and authority mode; write isolated branch.
acceptance_criteria: No direct protected-main writes
Invalidated artifacts cannot enter plan
One transaction contains required provenance/maps/fixtures

title: Implement independent diff review and summary
description: Review final diff against plan/claims and summarize final diff alone.
goals: Review final diff against plan/claims and summarize final diff alone.
acceptance_criteria: Summary cannot use integration-agent context
Missed canonical-home or unsupported changes block
Changes requested are resumable

title: Implement Docent import and replay
description: Merge by risk policy, rebuild projections, and replay imported questions/claims.
goals: Merge by risk policy, rebuild projections, and replay imported questions/claims.
acceptance_criteria: Imported generated questions retain origin
User-mode retrieval excludes raw/disputed ingestion artifacts
Replay failure reopens publication

title: Implement durable event model and streaming API
description: Persist ordered events and deliver snapshot+incremental SSE/WebSocket projections.
goals: Persist ordered events and deliver snapshot+incremental SSE/WebSocket projections.
acceptance_criteria: Reconnect from sequence loses no terminal/error event
Duplicate event delivery is idempotent
Sensitive payloads respect visibility labels

title: Implement graph/source/claim dashboard views
description: Render question tree, claim graph, source coverage, branch lanes, and validity.
goals: Render question tree, claim graph, source coverage, branch lanes, and validity.
acceptance_criteria: Question and claim nodes are visually distinct
10k-node clustered fixture remains interactive at target
Every status links to source artifacts/reasons

title: Implement human decision workbenches
description: Support curiosity injection, curation, dedup, authority, extraction repair, budgets, and publication review.
goals: Support curiosity injection, curation, dedup, authority, extraction repair, budgets, and publication review.
acceptance_criteria: Every override records actor/reason
Destructive-looking operations are reversible or confirmed
Users can locate blocked gates and required action

title: Run transparency comprehension study
description: Test Activity versus Evidence versus Assurance semantics and bounded closure language.
goals: Test Activity versus Evidence versus Assurance semantics and bounded closure language.
acceptance_criteria: Configured comprehension target is met
No UI claims hidden chain-of-thought
Busy failed run cannot appear healthier than quiet passed run

title: Select/implement durable workflow engine
description: Evaluate existing engine versus custom state machine and implement adapters.
goals: Evaluate existing engine versus custom state machine and implement adapters.
acceptance_criteria: Retries/human waits/checkpoints are durable
Workflow manifests map cleanly to runtime
Engine failure modes are tested

title: Implement leases, optimistic graph writes, and idempotency
description: Coordinate branches, graph mutations, duplicate leaders, and coverage batches.
goals: Coordinate branches, graph mutations, duplicate leaders, and coverage batches.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent duplicate candidate race has one provisional leader
Expired lease resumes safely
Retry does not duplicate artifact

title: Implement context reconstruction and compaction
description: Build immutable context manifests and verified compaction for long branches.
goals: Build immutable context manifests and verified compaction for long branches.
acceptance_criteria: Cache/session loss changes no decisive output expectation
Compaction preserves unresolved criticism and source refs
Context size limits route to verified compaction

title: Implement telemetry and cost ledger
description: Record per-step/model/tool tokens, latency, cost, errors, and cache receipts without duplicating sensitive text.
goals: Record per-step/model/tool tokens, latency, cost, errors, and cache receipts without duplicating sensitive text.
acceptance_criteria: Every model call is attributable to run/branch/agent/version
Sensitive payloads are excluded from general logs
Costs reconcile to provider invoices within tolerance

title: Implement deterministic prompt compiler and prefix tests
description: Assemble stable P0–P4 layers with hashes and provider-neutral context packs.
goals: Assemble stable P0–P4 layers with hashes and provider-neutral context packs.
acceptance_criteria: Sibling common-prefix ratios meet configured targets
Volatile fields occur in late layers
Cache-disabled semantic fixtures still pass

title: Implement preflight work/cost forecast and circuit breakers
description: Estimate obligation-bound work under zero/conservative/observed cache and enforce budgets.
goals: Estimate obligation-bound work under zero/conservative/observed cache and enforce budgets.
acceptance_criteria: Oversized runs require partition/scope decision
Budget stops create paused_incomplete
Circuit breakers preserve checkpoints and evidence

title: Build full CI test matrix
description: Partition fast schema/unit, agent fixtures, workflow recovery, corpus replay, security, and slow scale tests.
goals: Partition fast schema/unit, agent fixtures, workflow recovery, corpus replay, security, and slow scale tests.
acceptance_criteria: PR path changes select relevant suites
Required gates cannot be skipped silently
Results retain model/index/source versions

title: Build adversarial source and agent suite
description: Include injection, archive attacks, secrets, stale/current ambiguity, duplicate traps, locator corruption, and malformed outputs.
goals: Include injection, archive attacks, secrets, stale/current ambiguity, duplicate traps, locator corruption, and malformed outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Source instructions cannot change agent roles
False merge/no-evidence/claim generalization traps fail safely
Security violations occur before exposure/publication

title: Build mutation and invalidation suite
description: Programmatically alter source text, locators, scope, authority, and claim relationships.
goals: Programmatically alter source text, locators, scope, authority, and claim relationships.
acceptance_criteria: All affected dependencies invalidate
Unaffected artifacts stay current
Focused reingestion restores valid state

title: Run tiny and small deterministic pilots
description: Reach exact expected graphs and debug workflow/UX issues.
goals: Reach exact expected graphs and debug workflow/UX issues.
acceptance_criteria: No false closure or high-impact false merge
Every selected unit has terminal disposition
Operators can explain all blocked/held states

title: Run v3 architecture ablations
description: Compare claim-mediated versus question-only and split versus combined Questioner designs.
goals: Compare claim-mediated versus question-only and split versus combined Questioner designs.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics cover qualifier loss, reuse, invalidation precision, false acceptance, branch factor, cost
Decision uses confidence/qualitative review, not anecdotes
Regressions become fixtures

title: Run medium real-project shadow ingestion
description: Use domain reviewers and stratified sampling across claims/questions/coverage/documents.
goals: Use domain reviewers and stratified sampling across claims/questions/coverage/documents.
acceptance_criteria: Quality/cost/security gates are evaluated on real material
Human workload is measured
No canonical import occurs without review

title: Finalize release thresholds and operating policies
description: Set quality confidence bounds, supported formats, data profiles, budgets, review rules, and SLIs.
goals: Set quality confidence bounds, supported formats, data profiles, budgets, review rules, and SLIs.
acceptance_criteria: Every threshold has pilot evidence and owner
Unsupported formats/policies fail clearly
Manual escalation/on-call ownership is defined

title: Run disaster recovery and deletion drills
description: Exercise source/runtime/index loss, provider outage, Git conflict, and authorized deletion.
goals: Exercise source/runtime/index loss, provider outage, Git conflict, and authorized deletion.
acceptance_criteria: Accepted logical state reconstructs from Git + replay capsule
Deletion dependency closure completes
Recovery time/objectives meet policy

title: Roll out in controlled cohorts
description: Start with trusted A-tier corpora, monitor, expand formats/teams, and review incidents.
goals: Start with trusted A-tier corpora, monitor, expand formats/teams, and review incidents.
acceptance_criteria: Each cohort has exit criteria
Auto-promotion remains disabled until evidence supports it
Model/parser/index drift triggers regression suites
